summary: Focused verification of Instagram->Gmail swap and gallery image fixes. All acceptance criteria passed: Visit section shows Email row (mailto:abhushannirmata@gmail.com) with no Instagram entry; Footer's first social icon is Mail (mailto), no Instagram icon present; all 5 showroom gallery blocks render with correct 'X Gallery' headings; all 15 gallery images (including previously-broken Bangles and Earrings galleries) load successfully with naturalWidth>0; lightbox open/next/prev/close all work. Backend regression suite (4 pytest cases) 100% green.
passed: GET /api/rates -> 200 with numeric gold_24k_per_gram_inr and silver_per_gram_inr
Visit section: data-testid='visit-email' anchor href = mailto:abhushannirmata@gmail.com and shows the email text
Visit section: data-testid='visit-instagram' does NOT exist; word 'Instagram' not present anywhere in the Visit section
Footer social icons order = [Email(mailto:abhushannirmata@gmail.com), Facebook, Call(tel:+919113777874)] - no Instagram

Showroom shows all 5 gallery blocks: gallery-block-grand-hall, gallery-block-necklace-counter, gallery-block-bangles, gallery-block-bridal-lounge, gallery-block-earrings with matching 'Grand Hall Gallery' etc. headings
All 15 gallery images (5 galleries x 3 imgs each) reachable (HTTP 200 via HEAD) and rendered in-browser (naturalWidth > 0). Bangles and Earrings galleries specifically verified fixed
Clicking gallery-bangles-image-0 opens data-testid='showroom-lightbox' with valid full-screen image loaded
Lightbox next / prev / close buttons all functional; lightbox unmounts after close
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: SHOP.instagram key still exists in /app/frontend/src/constants/shop.js but is no longer referenced anywhere - safe to remove for cleanliness (non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: One test enquiry inserted with name 'TEST_User' via POST /api/enquiries (safe test data with TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 1 covered full site (contact form, hero, testimonials, collections, WhatsApp). Iteration 2 covered the Instagram->Gmail swap and gallery image replacements. Reusable pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py.
